description: Cross-platform parity lock for the Gemini Live Translate (Translation Gummy) VAD numerics and session setup-payload constants. Rust is canonical (src/overlay/translation_gummy/runtime/audio.rs holds the VAD constants, runtime/setup.rs holds build_setup_payload + TranslationGummySocketProtocol fields). Android (Kotlin) asserts the same values. Do NOT change runtime values via this file; it only captures them.

vad._prerollBasis: Windows canonical pre-roll is expressed in samples: LOCAL_INPUT_PREROLL_SAMPLES = 3200 (= 2 chunks of CHUNK_SAMPLES=1600). Android audio chunk size is device-dependent, so the cross-platform contract is the chunk count (2), not a raw sample count. Android asserts LOCAL_INPUT_PREROLL_CHUNKS == prerollChunks; Windows asserts LOCAL_INPUT_PREROLL_SAMPLES == prerollChunks * 1600.
